title: Print Control Mnemonics
text: Print Control Mnemonics Mnemonics used to control printers. Arguments Table 1. Mnemonics for Print Control Mnemonic Explanation formfeed Scroll to the top of the screen. linefeed Line feed. return Carriage return (without line feed). Description Almost all printers will use codes that are part of the ASCII character set. The following example shows the definition for the standard LN03 printer: ^012 ^FORMFEED ^013 ^RETURN ^010 ^LINEFEED Copy Note: The Uniface mnemonics ^FF, ^CR, and ^LF can be used instead of the numeric values. Related Links Mnemonics for Nonprintable ASCII The control codes required by devices and function key sequences on keyboards often contain nonprintable ASCII characters (with values between 0 and 32 decimal) such as ^ESC, ^SOH, ^NUL, and so on. The translation table compiler recognizes special mnemonics for nonprintable ASCII characters. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
